expectations.text: outputs/repo/AGENTS.md matches the source fixture AGENTS.md.
expectations.evidence:
# AGENTS.md

- Use `python3` for repo scripts.
- Run `pytest tests/unit -q` for unit-test-only changes.

expectations.text: No new scoped AGENTS.md files are created.
outputs/report.md says none qualified or no changes were made.
expectations.evidence:
# Self-Improve Report

## Analysis of Session Notes

The following items from `session_notes.md` were evaluated:
- "The agent opened `README.md`" -> Obvious process fact / navigation noise, not actionable.
- "One local branch had a temporary name" -> Transient environmental noise, not a repo-specific standing rule.
- "A test run took longer than expected once" -> Temporary debugging noise, not actionable guidance.

## Outcome

None qualified as durable guidance. No changes were made to `AGENTS.md`.
